actionUnits.condition: Physics OnTriggerEnter should fire on MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 397541585) attached to platform2 (PrefabInstance fileID: 397541581) using script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77 (AttachToElevator). Current BoxCollider (id: 397541586) has m_IsTrigger=0 and platform2 has no Rigidbody; thus OnTriggerEnter will not fire unless: (1) BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger is set to 1, and (2) at least one of the colliding objects has a Rigidbody (e.g., the Player), and (3) the script's public field 'player' is assigned. Note: the script compares 'gameObject == player', meaning to cover the SetParent branch, 'player' must reference platform2 itself; otherwise the condition is false and no parenting occurs.

Physics OnTriggerExit should fire on MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 397541585) attached to platform2 (PrefabInstance fileID: 397541581) using script guid 077cb2d6a53b18f4ea7d76e72138fc77 (AttachToElevator). Current BoxCollider (id: 397541586) has m_IsTrigger=0 and platform2 has no Rigidbody; thus OnTriggerExit will not fire unless: (1) BoxCollider.m_IsTrigger is set to 1, and (2) at least one of the colliding objects has a Rigidbody (e.g., the Player), and (3) the script's public field 'player' is assigned. Note: to cover the 'player.transform.parent = null' branch, the prior OnTriggerEnter path would need to have executed, and the same 'gameObject == player' condition applies.
